games.name: CS2 / CS:GO
games.notes: Valve Developer Community lists m_yaw default 0.022 for CS2. Hip-fire baseline only; custom m_yaw values are outside the default calculator scope.

games.name: Valorant
games.notes: Multiple public sensitivity references use Valorant yaw 0.07. Treat as reviewed rather than verified because Riot does not expose a canonical public yaw table. ADS and scoped sensitivity are not included.

games.name: Apex Legends
games.notes: Reviewed as a Source-engine hip-fire baseline matching 0.022 in multiple public sensitivity references. ADS multipliers and FOV behavior may require separate tuning.

games.name: The Finals
games.notes: Public converter references are mixed for The Finals. Keep experimental and do not create dedicated SEO pages until measured or better sourced.

games.name: Overwatch 2
games.notes: Multiple public sensitivity references use Overwatch 2 yaw 0.0066. Treat as reviewed rather than verified because Blizzard does not publish a canonical public yaw table. Hero-specific scoped behavior is not included.

games.name: Rainbow Six Siege
games.notes: Ubisoft documents the default MouseSensitivityMultiplierUnit as 0.02 and explains Siege hip-fire and ADS sensitivity formulas. Keep experimental because Siege slider, multiplier, optic, and ADS behavior are more complex than a single yaw constant.
